subcodes.first_line: Thy remembrance hath been mentioned before the Throne, and this exalted Tablet hath been revealed in the Persian tongue that thou mayest once again inhale the fragrance of the garment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی العرش مذکور و این لوح منیع بلسان پارسی نازل تا عرف قمیص را مره بعد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
